items.content: Our work TamperBench is accepted to KDD 2026 with an oral presentation (top 4.5% of papers).
Our work on LLM safety under fine-tuning is presented at the AIWILD, CAO, and RSI workshops at <u>ICLR 2026</u>.
Our work FOND: Domain Generalization for Domain-Linked Classes is accepted to TPAMI.
Graduated from <u>Waterloo Engineering</u> and transitioned to full-time as a Machine Learning Engineer at <u>Deep Breathe</u>.
Received the Best Design Award for our final year design project, Augmented Reality to Improve Ultrasound Acquisition.
Our work on automated detection of pleural effusions is accepted to the American Journal of Emergency Medicine.
Selected as an Honourable Mention for CRA Outstanding Undergraduate Researcher Award.
Our paper gets <u>Best Vision Paper Award</u> at the 10th Annual Conference on Vision and Intelligent Systems.
Our final year design project wins the <u>Yuen Family Foundation Award for Healthy Aging</u>.
Our work Language-guided Domain Adaptive Semantic Segmentation is accepted to AFM at NeurIPS 2024.
Completed an 8-month co-op as a Machine Learning Intern at <u>Kolena</u>.
Our work Spatio-Temporal Self-Attention for Egocentric 3D Pose Estimation is accepted to KDD 2023.
